message.content:
@startuml
participant "user" as User
participant "GStreamer Pipeline" as GStreamer
participant "realsensesrc" as RealsenseSrc
participant "librealsense2" as Librealsense2
participant "GStreamer" as GStreamer2

User -> GStreamer: load GSt pipeline with realsensesrc
GStreamer -> RealsenseSrc: create
RealsenseSrc -> Librealsense2: rs2::context.query_devices()
Librealsense2 -> RealsenseSrc: rs2::device_list
RealsenseSrc -> Librealsense2: select device by serial
Librealsense2 -> RealsenseSrc: rs2::sensor
RealsenseSrc -> Librealsense2: Select device

loop [for (info: rs2::rs2_camera_info)]
    RealsenseSrc -> Librealsense2: bool
    Librealsense2 -> RealsenseSrc: rs2::device.get_info(info)
    RealsenseSrc -> Librealsense2: const char* info_string
    Librealsense2 -> RealsenseSrc: store info
end loop

GStreamer -> RealsenseSrc: gst_tag_setter_add_tag_valist_values(..., NULL)
RealsenseSrc -> GStreamer2: Register per-stream metadata as Gst tags

RealsenseSrc -> Librealsense2: rs2::sensor.get_stream_profiles()
Librealsense2 -> RealsenseSrc: std::vector<rs2::stream_profile>

loop [for (profile: std::vector<rs2::stream_profile>) ]
    RealsenseSrc -> Librealsense2: Create profile_list of supported profiles
end loop

GStreamer -> RealsenseSrc: g_object_class_install_properties(......, options)
RealsenseSrc -> GStreamer2: Install all supported video profiles as an option

loop [for (option: rs2::option)]
    RealsenseSrc -> Librealsense2: bool
    Librealsense2 -> RealsenseSrc: rs2::sensor.get_option_range
    RealsenseSrc -> Librealsense2: rs2::option_range
    Librealsense2 -> RealsenseSrc: store option
end loop

GStreamer -> RealsenseSrc: g_object_class_install_properties(......, options)
RealsenseSrc -> GStreamer2: Install all supported RS camera options as properties/options

GStreamer -> RealsenseSrc: gst_bus_add_watch(bus, bus_call...)
RealsenseSrc -> GStreamer2: Register callback for parameter changes

caps negotiation (CAPS)
RealsenseSrc -> Librealsense2: - pixel_format
RealsenseSrc -> Librealsense2: - width
RealsenseSrc -> Librealsense2: - height
RealsenseSrc -> Librealsense2: - framerate

GStreamer -> RealsenseSrc: pipeline goto GST_STATE_PLAYING
GStreamer -> RealsenseSrc: state=playing
RealsenseSrc -> Librealsense2: rs2::sensor.start()

GStreamer -> RealsenseSrc: pipeline goto GST_STATE_READY
RealsenseSrc -> Librealsense2: rs2::sensor.stop()
@enduml
